Tests if the Number object has the "MIN_VALUE" property.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks if the `Number` object in JavaScript has the property `MIN_VALUE`. The `assert` function is used to verify that the `MIN_VALUE` property exists on the `Number` object, which is a standard property representing the smallest positive numeric value that can be represented in JavaScript. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a single property check within the JavaScript `Number` object. It is likely used in a testing context to ensure that the JavaScript environment correctly implements this property.
